channel.title: Yorkshire Family Days Out Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events in the Family Days Out category.

item.title: Address
item.description: Free monthly stay‑and‑play sessions for children aged 0–5 and their parents/carers, inspired by 50 Things to Do Before You’re Five.
item.location: Across Bradford Museums, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Across Bradford Museums, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: The Bobeam Tree
item.description: Discover a magical world of interactive discovery for 0–5-year-olds and their grown-ups. The Bobeam Tree is a magical tree, which, as the story goes, grows when surrounded by children’s curiosity, play, thoughts and feelings.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Sheffield Cablevision
item.description: Free Exhibition about the local Sheffield TV Station (1973-76). Kids shows, sports shows, politics, music, comedy and more. Rare archive footage, photos, objects inside.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Summer Holidays @ The Craft Cabin
item.description: Get creative this summer holidays at the Craft Cabin at Wentworth Woodhouse! From seasonal crafts to hands-on activities for all ages, this is the perfect way to spend a relaxed summer afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Address
item.description: Unleash your inner pop star over the summer holidays with creative activities for all ages at the National Science and Media Museum.
item.location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.ify:location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Summer Holidays - Ampleforth Adventures
item.description: join us this summer to reconnect with nature and enjoy the simple things in life - fresh air and room to play.
item.location: Ampleforth Abbey, Ampleforth Abbey, York, YO62 4EN, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
item.ify:location: Ampleforth Abbey, Ampleforth Abbey, York, YO62 4EN, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: 6 Weeks of Summer at Eureka!
item.location: Eureka! Science + Discovery
item.ify:location: Eureka! Science + Discovery
item.dc:creator: Eureka! Science + Discovery

item.title: Upcoming Events
item.description: We offer seasonal events with vava VOOM! The Father Christmas Experience will be on sale from June Easter Eggstravaganza, with the Bunny Brothers an
item.location: Web Adventure Park, York
item.ify:location: Web Adventure Park, York
item.dc:creator: Web Adventure Park

item.title: Stockeld Summer
item.description: Join us from 18th July until 6th September for a festival-themed summer - see live performers every day, including music acts, magicians and more! Plus, epic family outdoor activities to make this your best summer day out yet!
item.location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.ify:location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: Header Menu
item.description: We hold various fun and educational events every school holiday ! Whether you enjoy getting hands-on with science or listening to fascinating ocean talks, there's always something new to learn with every visit and for all ages.
item.location: The Deep, Hull
item.ify:location: The Deep, Hull
item.dc:creator: The Deep

item.title: NEW Event Rock Pools & Rocky Shores 18th July- 6th September 2026 10am-5pm Uncover the hidden treasures of the Yorkshire coast at our Rock Pools & Rocky Shores event! Between... Find out more
item.location: The Deep, Hull
item.ify:location: The Deep, Hull
item.dc:creator: The Deep

item.title: Address
item.description: This summer, The Broadway is bringing all the excitement of the fairground indoors with six weeks of FREE family fun!
item.location: Broadway Bradford, Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JR
item.ify:location: Broadway Bradford, Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Summer Holiday Activities at Sheffield Manor Lodge – Week 1
item.description: Come along to Sheffield Manor Lodge during the first week of the summer holidays and enjoy fun garden-themed craft and trail activities!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Free Summer Crafting
item.description: Free Summer Crafting Join us for our free drop-in Summer Crafting Sessions on The Courtyard EVERY TUESDAY AND THURSDAY! From 11-2, our wonderful team of volunteers will be on hand to help you create some exciting summer crafts. Sessions will run every Tuesday and Thursday throughout the summer holidays except for Thurs
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: ​Pokémon joins Fountains Abbey’s Summer of Play
item.description: Planning your summer holidays? Discover a Summer of Play supported by Pokémon. Plus, don't miss the Pokémon TCG Mega Evolution play zones... ​
item.location: Fountains Abbey and Studley Royal Water Garden, Ripon, North Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Fountains Abbey and Studley Royal Water Garden, Ripon, North Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Summer of Play at Wentworth Castle Gardens
item.description: Summer of Play is back! Join us for another adventure-filled summer, every day throughout the holidays. With a fairytale castle, secret gardens and plenty of space to explore, Wentworth Castle Gardens is the perfect setting for your Summer of Play.
item.location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Summer of Play: Family trail
item.description: Let Dart the Dragonfly lead your adventures in the gardens at Beningbrough this summer.
item.location: Beningbrough, York, North Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Beningbrough, York, North Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Fixing Fairytales with Gina Kaminski
item.description: Discover our family-friendly exhibition this summer.
item.location: Nunnington Hall, near York, North Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Nunnington Hall, near York, North Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Junior Bookclub at Waterstones York!
item.description: Join us at Waterstones York for our new Junior Bookclub! We will be hosting this new event on the last Sunday of every month. This bookclub aims to encourage children to talk about their favourite books, the book they are currently reading and what book they are wanting to read! Each new member of the Junior Bookclub w
item.location: Waterstones York, 15 Coney Street, York, UK
item.ify:location: Waterstones York, 15 Coney Street, York, UK
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings

item.title: Teen Chef! Summer Holiday Cooking Club!
item.description: Summer Cooking Club for Teens is here at Blend Culinary Foundation!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Relaxed SENDays
item.location: Eureka! Science + Discovery
item.ify:location: Eureka! Science + Discovery
item.dc:creator: Eureka! Science + Discovery

item.title: Summer River Workshops at Rowntree Park
item.description: Join sculptor and ceramicist Sarah Schiewe for a creative, family-friendly clay workshop inspired by York’s rivers, flooding history, and climate resilience. In this hands-on workshop, participants will create their own unique air-dry clay fish — a “river messenger” carrying stories, memories, and imagined journeys fro
item.location: Rowntree Park, Rowntree Park Lodge, Richardson St, York YO23 1JU
item.ify:location: Rowntree Park, Rowntree Park Lodge, Richardson St, York YO23 1JU
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings

item.title: Address
item.description: Catch the all‑new Be Like Blippi Tour live at Bradford Live, bringing Blippi and Meekah to the stage for an interactive family adventure.
item.location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.ify:location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Tornado: The Steam Superstar is Back at the NYMR
item.description: We're delighted to be welcoming back to the North Yorkshire Moors Railway, No. 60163 Tornado, one of Britain's most famous steam locomotives, courtesy of the A1 Steam Locomotive Trust. From Monday 27 July to Saturday 1 August and Monday 3 August to Saturday 8 August, the legendary locomotive will be hauling special ser
item.location: North York Moors Railway Pickering, Pickering Station, Pickering, North Yorkshire, YO18 7AJ
item.ify:location: North York Moors Railway Pickering, Pickering Station, Pickering, North Yorkshire, YO18 7AJ
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings

item.title: Address
item.description: Become a little archaeologist as you dig to uncover Roman or Viking clues — a fun, educational family activity at Bolling Hall Museum.
item.location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.ify:location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Yorkshire Day Market and Seaside Fun Zone, York
item.description: Yorkshire Day is coming to Parliament Street with a market brimming with the county's best independent makers and producers. From 30 July to 2 August, browse handcrafted goods, local treats and Yorkshire food and drink while soaking up the atmosphere in the city centre. There's a Seaside Fun Zone too, with a pop-up san
item.location: York
item.ify:location: York
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings

item.title: Address
item.description: The Bradford Culture Company brings the Beacon to Wibsey Park this August for a month of family‑friendly comedy, music, performance and play.
item.location: Wibsey Park, Wibsey Park Avenue, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD6 3QD
item.ify:location: Wibsey Park, Wibsey Park Avenue, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD6 3QD
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Yorkshire Day at Bradford Industrial Museum brings live music, Morris dancing, family activities, a visiting horse, and the vibrant Made By Many Hands Makers Market together for a lively summer celebration.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Discover fascinating facts about the inspiring Brontë sisters at Bolling Hall Museum, learn storytelling techniques, and create your own miniature book to fill with stories—just as the Brontës did when they were children.
item.location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.ify:location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Visit the Bradford Industrial Museum for a hands‑on wet‑felting craft session the whole family can enjoy.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Heritage Craft Room, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Heritage Craft Room, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Back by popular demand for 2026, Audacious presents a new British South Asian family pantomime! Get ready for an evening of laughter, romance, and larger-than-life entertainment at St. George's Hall.
item.location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.ify:location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: NEW Event Ecology at the Beach 11th August & 28th August 2026 11am-3pm Join us as we take you on a discovery of our local coastline at Sewerby Hall and Gardens on the 11th... Find out more
item.location: The Deep, Hull
item.ify:location: The Deep, Hull
item.dc:creator: The Deep

item.title: Address
item.description: Bring an old T-shirt to Bradford Industrial Museum and transform it into a unique fashion statement in this fun family upcycling workshop inspired by the exhibition Made by Many Hands.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Celebrate summer at Cartwright Hall Art Gallery with an afternoon/evening of nature-inspired activities, creative workshops and family-friendly fun, all set within the beautiful surroundings of Lister Park and Cartwright Hall.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Jimmy Eat World
item.description: Jimmy Eat World + RISE AGAINST & THE GET UP KIDS Arizona rock icons Jimmy Eat World have announced their live return to the UK with three huge outdoor headline shows taking place in August 2026…and they kick off in Halifax. Celebrating the 25th anniversary of their classic fourth studio album Bleed American, the exclus
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: NEW Event Beach Clean: Withernsea 24th August 2026 1pm-3pm Become a citizen scientist for the day and join our Crew on Monday 24th August 2026 between 1pm-3pm... Find out more
item.location: The Deep, Hull
item.ify:location: The Deep, Hull
item.dc:creator: The Deep

item.title: Halloween at Stockeld Park
item.description: Celebrate spooky season at Stockeld Park! With Woodland Witches, a home-grown Pumpkin Patch, magical forest trail, Zombie Laser, and the monster Maze, you're in for a day of skele-fun this Halloween!
item.location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.ify:location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: St Benedict’s Day
item.description: Celebrate the Feast Day of Benedict of Nursia, founder of the Order of St Benedict. Join us for a day of family-friendly activities as we explore the life and legacy of St Benedict and the Benedictine tradition that shapes daily life at Ampleforth Abbey. Children can enjoy a special themed trail, while families can lea
item.location: York
item.ify:location: York
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings

item.title: The Christmas Adventure
item.description: Explore North Pole Street and hop in the Enchanted Elevator to meet Santa in our immersive Grotto, take a spin on our Ice Rink, explore the Enchanted Forest, playgrounds, maze, and illuminations, and more this Christmas at Stockeld!
item.location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.ify:location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: The Enchanted Illuminations
item.description: Our annual Illuminations transform Stockeld Park into a dazzling, Winter Wonderland! With almost a mile of illuminations, projections, and sculptures, and new installations to see every year it's an event for your annual calendar.
item.location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.ify:location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: Mark the start of Christmas with Santa's arrival at Stockeld Park!
item.description: Join us for two days of festivities as we welcome Santa and Mrs Claus back to Stockeld for the Christmas season during our opening weekend.
item.location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.ify:location: Stockeld Park, Wetherby
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: Opera North: Little Listeners at the NCEM – Mini Magic Flute
item.description: Take the family on a magical musical journey inspired by Mozart's beloved opera, The Magic Flute. A trio of opera singers and an accordionist bring to life a Prince's quest to find a Princess, where nothing is quite what it seems! Meet a cast of fantastical characters, from a charming bird-catcher to a fearsome dragon,
item.location: National Centre for Early Music (NCEM), St Margaret’s Church York YO1 9TL
item.ify:location: National Centre for Early Music (NCEM), St Margaret’s Church York YO1 9TL
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings
